payload.answer: I found a conflict about Sara’s relationship to you: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory unchanged: Sara is my daughter.
Keep both memories as separate facts, acknowledging the ambiguity.
Clarify with more detail, e.g., Sara is my niece, not my daughter, or Sara is my daughter and also my niece by family relationship.
